title: The Mizoram University Act, 2000
full_text: The Mizoram University Act, 2000 मिजोरम विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2000 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200008 Act Number: 08 Enactment Date: 2001-04-25 Act Year: 2000 Short Title: The Mizoram University Act, 2000 Hindi Title: मिजोरम विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2000 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching and affiliating University in the State of Mizoram and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 02-07-2001 Notification: 2nd July, 2001, vide notification No. S.O. 604 (E), dated 29th June, 2001, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Mizoram University Act, 2000 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of the University. Section 4. Objects of the University. Section 5. Powers of the University. Section 6. Transfer of properties of North-Eastern Hill University. Section 7. Jurisdiction. Section 8. University open to all classes, castes and creed. Section 9. The Visitor. Section 9A. The Chief Rector. Section 10. Officers of the University. Section 11. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 12. The Pro-Vice Chancellor. Section 13. The Deans of Schools. Section 14. The Registrar. Section 15. The Finance Officer. Section 16. The Librarian. Section 17. Other officers. Section 18. Authorities of the University. Section 19. The Court. Section 20. The Executive Council. Section 21. The Academic Council. Section 22. The College Development Council. Section 23. The Boards of Studies. Section 24. The Finance Committee. Section 25. Other authorities of the University. Section 26. Powers to make Statutes. Section 27. Statutes how to be made. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Power to make Ordinances. Section 29. Regulations. Section 30. Annual report. Section 31. Annual accounts. Section 32. Returns and information. Section 33. Transfer of services of certain employees of the North-Eastern Hill University. Section 34. Conditions of service of employees. Section 35. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 36. Right to appeal. Section 37. Provident and pension funds. Section 38. Disputes as to constitution of University authorities and bodies. Section 39. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 40. Proceedings of University authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 41. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 42. Mode of proof of University record. Section 43. Power to remove difficulties. Section 44. Transitional provisions. Section 45. Completion of courses of studies in Colleges or Institutions affiliated to the University. Section 46. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 47. Amendment of Act 24 of 1973. Schedule 1.
